market_overview.headline: Market remains in consolidation with 30% Full Bull but BTC weakness creating risk-off undertones.
market_overview.detail: SPY holding Bull Pullback to 21W support while QQQ shows unstacked bullish structure, but BTC's Full Bear breakdown (-17% vs 21W) signals crypto risk-off that could spill into equities.

reversal_candidates.headline: Bear Rally Reversal Watch - Early Bull Cross Signals

items.name: Netflix, Inc.
items.note: Strong rally above 13W with 8W EMA about to cross bullish, potential trend reversal signal in mega-cap tech.

items.name: Apple Inc.
items.crossover_detail: 8W just below 13W (0.14%) — bullish cross potential; 13W just above 21W (0.85%) — bearish cross risk
items.note: AAPL showing tight EMA compression near breakeven, 8W about to cross 13W bullish.

items.name: BYD Co., Ltd.
items.note: Chinese EV leader rallying above 13W with imminent 8W bullish cross setup.

items.name: Meta Platforms, Inc.
items.crossover_detail: 8W just below 13W (0.51%) — bullish cross potential; 13W just below 21W (0.83%) — bullish cross potential
items.note: META showing double bullish crossover potential despite Full Bear structure, key reversal candidate.

items.name: Citigroup, Inc.
items.note: Major bank with tight 8W/13W compression suggesting potential reversal from oversold levels.

pullback_setups.headline: Quality Pullback Entries in Established Uptrends

items.name: Freeport-McMoRan, Inc.
items.note: Copper play with strong 21W cushion pulling back to 13W support, solid risk/reward setup.

items.name: Lam Research Corporation
items.note: Semi equipment leader with healthy pullback in established uptrend, quality entry opportunity.

items.name: Newmont Corporation
items.note: Gold miner benefiting from metals momentum with textbook pullback to 13W EMA support.

items.name: Analog Devices, Inc.
items.note: Semiconductor strength continues with ADI offering pullback entry in strong uptrend.

momentum_themes.headline: Electronic Tech & Materials Leading Momentum
momentum_themes.detail: Memory/storage stocks showing explosive moves with WDC (+23% vs 21W) and MU (+20% vs 21W) leading, while materials complex (copper, gold) sustaining strong trends.

sector_analysis.headline: Clear Resource vs Tech Services Divergence

strongest.note: Perfect bullish structure with all 10 names in uptrends, benefiting from commodity strength.
Copper, gold miners showing unanimous bullish structure despite pullbacks in names like FCX, NEM.
Infrastructure theme intact with all 9 names maintaining bullish EMA structure.

weakest.note: Massive underperformance with 20 of 22 names bearish, including MSFT, META, CRM.
Complete breakdown in services sector with both names bearish.
Banks struggling despite rate environment with 56 of 101 names in bearish structure.

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation from growth tech into value/cyclicals with resource sectors at 100% bullish while tech services collapsed to 91% bearish.

items.text: SPY 8W/13W compression with bearish cross risk could trigger broader market pullback
BTC Full Bear breakdown (-17% vs 21W) creating risk-off sentiment that may spread to growth stocks
Tech services sector showing 91% bearish structure with mega-caps like MSFT, META under pressure
29 Bull Breakdowns signal cracks in previously strong uptrends across multiple sectors
